headline: Ball Corporation Releases 2025 Combined Annual and Sustainability Report
summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) today released its 2025 Combined Annual and Sustainability Report, providing stakeholders a comprehensive overview of the year including performance across each segment of the company's global aluminum packaging business.
